title: Knowledge Representation Using Rules: Forward and Backward Chaining
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of using a Rule Base for both forward chaining (data-driven) and backward chaining (goal-driven) inference to derive new facts or validate a hypothesis.
relationships: Forward Chaining: Fact Base triggers rules in Rule Base to produce New Inferred Facts
Backward Chaining: Inference Engine uses User Query to find supporting rules and facts in Rule Base and Fact Base
